description.en: You find a glowing fountain. The water looks inviting.
description.zh: 你发现了一个发光的喷泉。泉水看起来很诱人。

result_text.en: The water refreshes you! +20 HP
result_text.zh: 泉水让你恢复了活力！+20生命值

result_text.en: You continue your journey.
result_text.zh: 你继续你的旅程。

description.en: You discover a locked chest. It might contain treasure... or a trap.
description.zh: 你发现了一个上锁的箱子。它可能装着宝藏……或者陷阱。

result_text.en: You found gold! +30 gold
result_text.zh: 你找到了金币！+30金币

result_text.en: It was trapped! You take 10 damage.
result_text.zh: 这是个陷阱！你受到10点伤害。

result_text.en: Better safe than sorry.
result_text.zh: 小心驶得万年船。

description.en: A mysterious merchant offers you a deal.
description.zh: 一个神秘的商人向你提出交易。

result_text.en: You bought a potion and drank it. +25 HP, -20 gold
result_text.zh: 你买了药水并喝下。+25生命值，-20金币

result_text.en: The merchant shrugs and disappears.
result_text.zh: 商人耸耸肩消失了。

description.en: You find an ancient shrine. A voice whispers: 'Offer gold for power, or take a blessing.'
description.zh: 你发现了一座古老的神殿。一个声音低语道：'献上金币换取力量，或接受祝福。'

result_text.en: Divine energy flows through you! +40 HP, -50 gold
result_text.zh: 神圣的能量流过你的身体！+40生命值，-50金币

result_text.en: You feel slightly stronger. +15 HP
result_text.zh: 你感觉稍微强壮了一些。+15生命值

result_text.en: You bow and continue your journey.
result_text.zh: 你鞠躬后继续你的旅程。

description.en: A hooded figure approaches you. 'I can share knowledge... for a price.'
description.zh: 一个戴兜帽的人向你走来。'我可以分享知识……但需要付出代价。'

result_text.en: The stranger teaches you survival techniques. +30 HP, -20 gold
result_text.zh: 陌生人教给你生存技巧。+30生命值，-20金币

result_text.en: The stranger vanishes into the shadows.
result_text.zh: 陌生人消失在阴影中。

description.en: A dark altar radiates malevolent energy. Gold coins are scattered around it.
description.zh: 一座黑暗的祭坛散发着邪恶的能量。周围散落着金币。

result_text.en: You grab the gold quickly. +50 gold
result_text.zh: 你迅速拿走了金币。+50金币

result_text.en: Dark energy surges through you! -15 HP
result_text.zh: 黑暗能量涌入你的身体！-15生命值

result_text.en: You wisely avoid the cursed place.
result_text.zh: 你明智地避开了这个被诅咒的地方。

description.en: You discover a natural spring with crystal-clear water. The air feels rejuvenating.
description.zh: 你发现了一处天然泉水，水质清澈见底。空气中弥漫着恢复活力的气息。

result_text.en: You feel greatly refreshed! +35 HP
result_text.zh: 你感到精神焕发！+35生命值

result_text.en: You press onward.
result_text.zh: 你继续前进。

description.en: You stumble upon a hidden gambling den. A dealer offers you a game of chance.
description.zh: 你偶然发现了一个隐秘的赌场。一个荷官邀请你玩一局。

result_text.en: You win big! +80 gold
result_text.zh: 你大获全胜！+80金币

result_text.en: You win a modest amount. +30 gold
result_text.zh: 你赢得了一些金币。+30金币

result_text.en: You walk away from the temptation.
result_text.zh: 你抵制住了诱惑。

description.en: You find an injured adventurer. They offer to share their supplies if you help them.
description.zh: 你发现了一个受伤的冒险者。如果你帮助他们，他们愿意分享补给。

result_text.en: They thank you and give you gold. +60 gold (but you spent energy helping)
result_text.zh: 他们感谢你并给了你金币。+60金币（但你消耗了体力帮助他们）

result_text.en: You continue on your way.
result_text.zh: 你继续你的路。

description.en: You discover a dusty library filled with ancient tomes. One book glows with magical energy.
description.zh: 你发现了一座布满灰尘的图书馆，里面摆满了古老的典籍。一本书散发着魔法能量。

result_text.en: Ancient wisdom fills your mind! +40 HP
result_text.zh: 古老的智慧充盈你的心灵！+40生命值

result_text.en: You find hidden gold among the books. +40 gold
result_text.zh: 你在书籍中找到了隐藏的金币。+40金币

result_text.en: You decide not to disturb this place.
result_text.zh: 你决定不打扰这个地方。
